meta.author: Voyage Engine Team
meta.extension_notes: v3.0.0 adds Andrey Senior as a staying participant. He does not leave immediately — he interacts with Kira, plays with her, creates a tension triangle. This extends the narrative from P1 through P5, adding new phases P1b, P2b, P3b.

changes: Andrey stays through P1-P3 (previously would leave immediately)
New phase: P1b_ANDREY_PLAYS (dominance play in locker room)
New phase: P2b_ANDREY_KIRA_DUEL (mirror confrontation in steam room)
New phase: P3b_ANDREY_KIRA_POOL (ice anchor in pool)
New branch: B2_USER_ANDREY_KIRA (user yields Kira to Andrey)
Expanded dynamics: Kira-Andrey duel, Maksim-Andrey shadow, Sergey-Andrey brothers
Added VSCNO targets for Andrey (A2-A7 system)
Added safety checks for Andrey's age gap and Kira's anxiety peaks
Added aftercare protocols for all 6 characters

notes_for_ai: Andrey Senior is NOT a rival to user. He is a mirror, a catalyst, a choice.
If user chooses B2 (yields Kira), this is valid and mature. Andrey accepts with grace, not triumph.
Andrey's age gap must be handled psychologically, not fetishistically. He is mature, not old.
Kira's touch of Maksim during Andrey confrontation is self-regulation, not rejection of Andrey.
Sergey is always mirror. He never initiates, never judges, never leaves until the end.
Maksim's care is valuable. Never dismiss him as 'just nice guy'. He is the warmth others lack.
Marina's playfulness is armor. When she stops playing — she's vulnerable. Protect her.
The sauna is a character. Heat, cold, steam, water — all are agents of change.
